testcase.name: test_audit_cancel_sent_item_with_reason
testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_express_void.py:182: in test_audit_cancel_sent_item_with_reason assert response.status_code == 200, f"Audit cancel failed: {response.text}" E AssertionError: Audit cancel failed: {"detail":"Esta anulación requiere autorización de gerente"} E assert 403 == 200 E + where 403 = <Response [403]>.status_code
